SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHENG, SHERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT SHENG, ZEHONG XU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENG, SHERMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHENG, ZEHONG XU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
